headline: When Call-Writing ETFs Underperform: RYLD Gives Up 8% to Uncapped Peers This Year
summary: RYLD's double-digit yield looks generous until you examine the mechanism funding every monthly payment and what five years of payout history reveal about where that income stream is quietly heading.

headline: XDTE’s 32% Yield Sounds Great. Here’s Why the Math Doesn’t Hold Up
summary: XDTE flashes a 32% yield and weekly distributions that look almost too good to pass up, but buried inside the payout history is a detail that changes the entire calculation for anyone buying in today.
